overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a desert highway in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves along the sandy shoulder beside a multi-lane road lined with solar panel arrays, passing vehicles and approaching a parked military truck with NPCs before continuing down the road toward a distant city.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with solar farm

events.description: black sedan passes by on the asphalt road to the right
camera slightly adjusts path to approach the parked vehicle ahead on the shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy shoulder of the desert highway, approaching a parked vehicle in the distance

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the highway moving away from camera

entered.detail: tall rectangular billboard structure with blank dark face and support pillars
rows of elevated solar panels on concrete pillars extending along the highway
reddish desert mesas and mountains under the clear sky
scattered yucca plants and dry desert bushes along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a desert highway shoulder with solar panel arrays lining the right side and a large billboard on the left. Sparse desert vegetation dots the sandy ground while vehicles occasionally pass on the asphalt road. The scene approaches a parked military vehicle in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway checkpoint with parked military vehicle

events.description: approaching the parked military vehicle and NPC soldier standing beside it
camera moves around the left side of the parked vehicle to pass it
silver sports car passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling around the parked military vehicle, observing the NPC soldier beside it

notable_agents.action: armored military truck parked on the shoulder with dusty camouflage pattern
soldier in tactical gear standing beside the parked truck facing the road

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with holographic ring displays visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a parked military vehicle with a soldier standing guard beside it. The camera passes around the vehicle's left side, revealing futuristic city towers with holographic displays in the distant background. The large billboard exits the frame left as the solar arrays remain prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway continuing toward distant city

events.description: white sedan passes by on the highway to the right
dark vehicle passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the desert highway shoulder away from the parked vehicle, heading toward the distant city

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the desert highway past the military checkpoint. Solar arrays extend along the right side while the distant city towers remain visible ahead. Sparse traffic passes occasionally on the road as the journey continues through the arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a desert highway that transitions from a lonely roadside stretch into a vista overlooking a distant futuristic metropolis. It begins on a sandy shoulder flanked by solar panel arrays and a large billboard, moving past sparse vegetation as vehicles travel along the asphalt. As the camera approaches a parked military vehicle, it glides around the soldier on guard, causing the billboard to exit the frame and revealing towering city skyscrapers with holographic displays on the horizon. The scene then opens further as the camera passes the checkpoint, continuing its journey through the arid landscape with the solar arrays extending along the right. Finally, the movement persists down the highway, keeping the distant city towers centered as occasional traffic passes through the desert.
